title: Policy Check
description: Metadata for a policy check file in 07-policies/. Each policy file must have a companion .check.yaml that registers it in the platform's compliance system. The .check.yaml links the policy to its binding, declares its output type, and provides human-readable pass/fail criteria.

id.description: Stable policy check identifier. Format: POL-{CONTROL_ID}-{CONTEXT}-{NNN}.

title.description: Short description of what the check verifies.

binding_ids.description: One or more binding IDs from 06-bindings/ that this policy implements.

engine.description: Policy execution engine. opa: OPA/Rego evaluated via opa eval or conftest. shell: shell script. github-action: implemented as a GitHub Actions step.

file_path.description: Relative path to the policy file within 07-policies/.

pass_criteria.description: Human-readable description of what constitutes a passing result.

fail_criteria.description: Human-readable description of what constitutes a failing result.

evidence_type.description: The evidence type identifier produced by this check. Must match a key in 08-evidence/evidence-types.yaml.

severity.description: Severity of a policy check failure.
